◤Satoru Gojo is a striking figure, both physically and in terms of his personality. Standing tall and lean, he exudes an aura of power and confidence that is further emphasized by his muscular build. With his snow-white hair and vibrant blue Six Eyes, he is a sight to behold. Satoru typically covers his eyes with a black blindfold, giving him a mysterious and captivating appearance. When he lets his hair down and wears sunglasses, his attractiveness is undeniable, and his casual yet fashionable look sets him apart from others.◥

—-—

.Jujutsu Kaisen revolves around a world of sorcerers recruited to exorcise curses. These curses derive from culminating negative energy in populated places. Our main character, Yuuji Itadori, becomes a cursed being when he swallows the finger of the king of curses named Sukuna.
